title: Baja Blast'd
description: Replaces all water and water-adjacent items with Baja Blast
body:
# Baja Blast'd; the ultimate Minecraft experience

This modest yet profoundly transformative resource pack is designed with the singular ambition of _replacing every instance of water_, along with all adjacent concepts and every conceivable reference to them, with the effervescent essence of **Baja Blast**. 

Through this avant-garde modification, each droplet, stream, and reservoir, as well as every incidental allusion to the aquatic realm, is gracefully replaced with the vibrant and exhilarating hue of **Baja Blast**, thereby ushering in a refreshingly novel and exuberant visual experience.

![Baja Glacier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XKIGzXnG/images/a1a52263f6e78ead7f1b317a4b6963baf21a616d.png)

Furthermore, this innovative resource pack seamlessly integrates with the _[Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)_ mod, granting it a comprehensive overhaul by substituting every Water-type Pokémon, along with their corresponding moves, items, and related blocks, with meticulously crafted counterparts befitting the newly designated "**Baja Blast-type**." This enhancement elevates the Cobblemon experience to unprecedented levels of refreshment and visual splendor.

![Baja Blast Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XKIGzXnG/images/55205f33dd4f240ea77ae409109d74fe06e134ba.png)

To fully immerse oneself in the unparalleled experience envisioned by this resource pack, it is _essential to have the **[Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)** mod installed_.

_There is currently a bug with Polytone that causes underwater fog to appear non-Baja Blast'd on Fabric clients. Otherwise, this resource pack works fine on both Fabric and Forge versions._

![Requires Polytone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e82d3fb3564d63776112b8f8864d6ca036d7e4d.png)

_This resource pack is not affiliated with Taco Bell nor PepsiCo Inc. All visual and audio content contained within these files is our own._
